text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Once again, my teacher is<n>gracing me with
their time and love in<n>the form of...
supplementary lessons!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That makes two months in a row! For<n>them to
devote so much time to me, I<n>must truly be a
genius!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Their expectations for me must reach the<n>
ceiling—No! They must reach far beyond<n>the
atmosphere itself!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I must give today my all!<n>Bakushin,
Bakushiiin!
